name: polyhive

scripts.build:daemon: npm run build --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-highlight && npm run build --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-relay && npm run build --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-server && npm run build --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-cli
scripts.typecheck:daemon: npm run typecheck --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-cli
scripts.build:desktop: npm run version:sync-internal && npm run build:web --workspace=polyhive-app && npm run build --workspace=polyhive-desktop
scripts.version: npm run version:sync-internal && npm run release:prepare && git add -A
scripts.release:check: npm run release:prepare && npm run typecheck --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-highlight && npm run build --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-highlight && npm run typecheck --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-relay && npm run build --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-server && npm run build --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-cli && npm run build --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-cli && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-highlight && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-relay && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-server && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-cli
scripts.release:publish:dry-run: npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-highlight --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-relay --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-server --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-cli --access public
scripts.release:publish: npm publish --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-highlight --access public && npm publish --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-relay --access public && npm publish --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-server --access public && npm publish --workspace=@evertondgn/polyhive-cli --access public
scripts.release:beta:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:patch && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:minor && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:major && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:next: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:next && npm run release:push
scripts.release:promote: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:promote && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:patch && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:minor && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:major && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push

description: PolyHive: monitor and control your local AI coding agents from any browser (macOS daemon + web app)
